<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/deploy-quickstart-to-devnet.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-deploy-quickstart-to-devnet-bash-607" location="lines:607-612" -->
```bash
   docker exec -it splice-validator-postgres-splice-1 psql -U cnadmin -d validator -c "
     SELECT schemaname, tablename 
     FROM pg_tables 
     WHERE schemaname = 'validator' 
     ORDER BY tablename;"

```
